description: OVEN modeled as Lock
STOVETOP modeled as Lock
PREP_STATION modeled as Lock
channel from CHEF_B to CHEF_A for garnish
channel from CHEF_A to CHEF_C for sauce
channel from CHEF_C to CHEF_B for glaze
plating requires successful cook and received ingredient
cooking requires prior prep_mise_en_place
cook failure requires re-prep before re-cook
prep_mise_en_place and plate_dish require holding PREP_STATION
cook_on_stovetop requires holding STOVETOP
cook_in_oven requires holding OVEN
sauce preparation requires STOVETOP (can fail)
garnish preparation requires STOVETOP (can fail)
glaze preparation requires OVEN (can fail)
each cooking step can pass or fail, requiring re-prep on failure
ingredient cooking can fail, requiring re-prep of ingredient
3 chefs contend for 3 equipment pieces — PREP_STATION + STOVETOP + OVEN
chef holds STOVETOP/OVEN after cook failure, needs PREP_STATION for re-prep — hold-and-wait deadlock risk
circular ingredient dependencies (A→C, B→A, C→B) combined with equipment requirements
failed cook forces chef back to PREP_STATION, competing with chefs who need PREP_STATION for plating
all three chefs can start working concurrently
